source_pr.title: *: pass make race
source_pr.body:
1. Fix bug founded in make race.
2. Fix make race run too long problem.

symptoms: server: prevent running go test race
failure_signature: server: prevent running go test race
root_cause_explanation: The test suite was flaky under the race detector because DDL workers invoke hook callbacks concurrently while tests set or read hook state without synchronization. This PR stabilizes it by adding mutex protection around hook assignment and hook callback invocations, and by adjusting server-side tests to avoid excessive work under -race.
fix_pattern: Guard shared hook/callback state with a mutex when accessed across goroutines; avoid extremely heavy integration workloads in -race runs.

evidence: evidence: server: prevent running go test race

analysis:
